title: Optimized Hypixel SkyBlock
description: A lightweight yet content-rich mod pack, designed to optimize your game’s performance and make it smoother. It includes all the latest updates and essential mods to deliver a complete, modern, and even more immersive Skyblock experience.
body:
# 📦 Modpack Changelog – Version 1.0.0 (Initial Release)

A lightweight yet content-rich mod pack, designed to optimize your game’s performance and make it smoother. It includes all the latest updates and essential mods to deliver a complete, modern, and even more immersive Skyblock experience.

## 🆕 Main Highlights:

First stable release of the modpack optimized for Skyblock gameplay.

Carefully selected lightweight and performance-friendly mods for a smooth experience, even on low-end PCs.

Includes all the essential mods for a complete and modern Skyblock experience.

## ⚙️ Optimization & Performance:

Includes FPS boosters, improved rendering mods, and advanced memory management.

Enhanced support for low-end setups.

## 📦 Core Mods Included:


<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- AsyncParticles
- BetterF3
- Cloth Config API
- Concurrent Chunk Management
- Continuity
- Controlling
- Cubes Without Borders
- **DulkirMod-Fabric**
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FastQuit
- FerriteCore
- **Firmament for Hypixel SkyBlock**
- Freelook _(Possible Disable)_
- Gamma Utils (Fullbright)
- ImmediatelyFast
- Lithium
- Mod Menu
- modernfix-fabric-5.20.4
- More Chat History
- More Culling
- Mouse Tweaks
- nvidium-0.4.1-beta8-1.21.5
- OptiGUI
- Scrollable Tooltips
- Searchables
- **Skyblocker • Hypixel Skyblock**
- **SkyHanni for Hypixel SkyBlock**
- Smooth Scrolling
- Sodium
- Text Placeholder API

</details>



> - **Sodium** / **Lithium** / **Nvidium** / **C2M** ... – Client-side performance optimizations.
> 
> - Skyblock Mod: **Firmament**, **DulkirMod**, **Skyblocker** and **SkyHanni**
> 
> - more mods to improve user experience

## Texturepack:

<details>
<summary>Texturepack List</summary>

- Default HD 128x
- Fast Better Grass
- Fresh Animations
- **Furfsky Reborn**
- looshy
- looshy dark mode
- Low On Fire

</details>




### 🔧 Additional Features:
Preconfigured settings for optimal balance between graphics quality and performance.
